description_long: This is a decorative double-armed street lamp with a robust, square base and a tall, cylindrical post. The lamp features two lantern-style light fixtures suspended from curved, ornate metal arms extending from the top of the post. Each lantern is encased in a metallic frame with glass panels, emitting a warm, ambient glow. The post is adorned with subtle gold accents and a geometric pattern near the base, adding a touch of elegance. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with glass used for the lantern enclosures. This lamp is designed for outdoor urban environments, such as sidewalks, parks, or plazas.
description: A double-armed, decorative street lamp with two lantern-style lights suspended from ornate metal arms and a sturdy, patterned base. The lamp features metallic and glass construction with gold accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lanterns hanging symmetrically from the curved arms and the decorative details on the post.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lanterns and the thickness of the central post.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both lanterns visible and the geometric base pattern apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the profile of the lanterns and the structure of the supporting arms.
